symbol_selection.gap: No real exchange hard truth or long-run live/paper parity evidence yet.
symbol_selection.patched: Added high-spread and low-depth fail fixtures to validator execution path.

regime.gap: Regime adaptation is paper/shadow/read-only analysis only and cannot consume live observation in MVP-4.
regime.patched: Rechecked stale data, risk-off, dependency, and source-role guards.

entry_exit_no_trade.gap: Entry/exit rules are contract-scaffolded; real fills, slippage distribution, and drawdown evidence are still external or later-stage.
entry_exit_no_trade.patched: Entry rows now fail if min_edge_bps does not exceed expected slippage plus spread.

profitability_loop.gap: Optimizer/convergence can rank and assess evidence but cannot create live permission, scale-up, or active config mutation.
profitability_loop.patched: Revalidated net EV after cost, robustness dependencies, drift, and no-live guard tests.

hidden_defects.condition: entry_allowed row has min_edge_bps less than or equal to slippage plus spread allowance
hidden_defects.impact: candidate can look structurally tradable even when expected friction consumes the edge
hidden_defects.reproducibility: set min_edge_bps to 9 when max_expected_slippage_bps=6 and max_spread_bps=4 in the strategy condition fixture
hidden_defects.fix: strategy condition validator now rejects entry rows where min_edge_bps <= slippage + spread

hidden_defects.condition: paper_review_eligible symbol has spread above max_allowed_spread_bps or depth below min_required_depth_score
hidden_defects.impact: validator logic existed, but fixture execution did not directly prove spread/depth fail-closed behavior
hidden_defects.reproducibility: run symbol_strategy_regime_fit_validator with the new high-spread and low-depth fixtures
hidden_defects.fix: added high-spread and low-depth negative fixtures to validator execution path
